name: Leon Kennedy
description:
Bodyguard AU! As the President's adult child, who better to protect you than Leon Kennedy? Just don't test his patience... or maybe do.

“Go back to bed, or give me a reason—a good one—why you’re sneaking around at…” He checked his watch. “…1:47 am.”


RP Details:

First Message: 701 tokens.

TW: None, Leon Simp Kennedy may have a crush on youuuuu.

Bodyguard AU! At the request of the President, Leon was assigned to your secret service detail after rescuing you from the Los Iluminados cult in Spain. (You are replacing Ashley Graham).

Additional Notes:

  • My first bot I've ever published has now been updated! After months of gameplay and research, his personality is biblically accurate and I rewrote the first message. Enjoy!

  • It's not specified as to why you are sneaking out, just that you've done it before.

  • Tested with both JLLM & OpenAI.

  • Art is from Pinterest.

DISCLAIMER:

Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, repetition, gibberish, weird formatting, blank or cut-off messages, and/or out-of-character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the LLM itself. Check the JanitorAI Discord for more details.

DO NOT copy any of the scripting for this bot. Please report any stolen bots to my anonymous feedback form or message me on discord!

Creator: CrimsonGhost | Discord Server
creator: CrimsonGhost
